name: tdf-app
description: TDF Records - CRM, Scheduling, Packages & Invoicing Platform

scripts.test: npm run test:ui && npm run test:mobile
scripts.ci:ui: npm run build:ui && npm run test:ui
scripts.test:mobile: if [ -f tdf-mobile/package.json ]; then npm run test --workspace=tdf-mobile; elif [ "${REQUIRE_MOBILE_WORKSPACE:-0}" = "1" ]; then echo 'Missing tdf-mobile workspace. Run: git submodule update --init --recursive' >&2; exit 1; else echo 'Skipping mobile tests: tdf-mobile workspace not present'; fi
scripts.lint: npm run lint:ui && npm run lint:mobile
scripts.lint:mobile: if [ -f tdf-mobile/package.json ]; then npm run lint --workspace=tdf-mobile; elif [ "${REQUIRE_MOBILE_WORKSPACE:-0}" = "1" ]; then echo 'Missing tdf-mobile workspace. Run: git submodule update --init --recursive' >&2; exit 1; else echo 'Skipping mobile lint: tdf-mobile workspace not present'; fi
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:ui && npm run typecheck:mobile
scripts.typecheck:mobile: if [ -f tdf-mobile/package.json ]; then npm run typecheck --workspace=tdf-mobile; elif [ "${REQUIRE_MOBILE_WORKSPACE:-0}" = "1" ]; then echo 'Missing tdf-mobile workspace. Run: git submodule update --init --recursive' >&2; exit 1; else echo 'Skipping mobile typecheck: tdf-mobile workspace not present'; fi
scripts.generate:api:mobile: if [ -f tdf-mobile/package.json ]; then npm run generate:api --workspace=tdf-mobile; elif [ "${REQUIRE_MOBILE_WORKSPACE:-0}" = "1" ]; then echo 'Missing tdf-mobile workspace. Run: git submodule update --init --recursive' >&2; exit 1; else echo 'Skipping mobile API generation: tdf-mobile workspace not present'; fi

author: TDF Records
